vault._comment: Vault integration for secure secrets management. Set enabled=true to use Vault for API keys and tool credentials. Supports token, AppRole, and Kubernetes auth methods.

upstream._comment: mode=mock returns a synthetic Anthropic-shaped response so the demo runs fully offline. mode=passthrough forwards to a real Model API using the enterprise key from Vault or env var below.

guardrails._comment: provider=auto uses OpenGuardrails (context-aware detection incl. indirect prompt injection) when OPENGUARDRAILS_API_KEY is set, else the local regex detector so the demo runs offline.

opa._comment: Optional Open Policy Agent sidecar integration. When enabled (or AGENTZT_OPA=1), the gateway POSTs {input} to /v1/data/{policyPath}. OPA can only add an extra deny after local deny-by-default RBAC/JIT and ABAC pass.

signoz._comment: Optional SigNoz OTLP/HTTP telemetry. Enable with enabled=true or AGENTZT_SIGNOZ=1. Self-hosted default endpoint is http://localhost:4318; set SIGNOZ_INGESTION_KEY for SigNoz Cloud.

tls._comment: Mutual TLS, opt-in (disabled by default so the zero-setup HTTP demo works). Run `agentzt tls init` to create the CA + server cert, then set enabled=true (or start the gateway with AGENTZT_TLS=1).

sandbox._comment: AIOsandbox integration for agent execution. enabled=true enables the sandbox. baseUrl is the AIOsandbox service address. autoStart=true will attempt to start the Docker container automatically.
